## Summary

-

## Verification

- [ ] Ran the relevant checks:
- [ ] Added or updated tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] Checked the affected routes with realistic data, empty state, and error state.

## Design Review

- [ ] No inner scrollbars, clipped content, overlapping text, or layout shift in the changed surfaces.
- [ ] Responsive states checked at mobile, tablet, and desktop widths, with screenshots attached for visual changes.
- [ ] Keyboard focus, hover, active, disabled, and selected states are visible and consistent.
- [ ] Reduced-motion behavior is safe: no required information depends on animation, jiggle, stagger, or scale.
- [ ] Colors, shadows, borders, spacing, and typography use existing tokens or documented new tokens.
- [ ] Charts and semantic colors preserve contrast in both light and dark themes where applicable.
- [ ] Icon buttons have accessible labels/tooltips and at least a 32px practical hit target.

## Notes for Reviewers
